meta.summary: Utilities for filtering, summarizing, validating, comparing, and converting VCF/BCF variant files.
meta.description: Utilities for filtering, summarizing, validating, comparing, and converting VCF/BCF variant files.

test: vcftools --version 2>&1 | grep -Fx 'VCFtools (0.1.17)' >/dev/null && vcftools --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Process Variant Call Format files' >/dev/null && vcf-validator --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage: vcf-validator' >/dev/null && vcf-query --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Please use' >/dev/null && perl -MVcf -MVcfStats -MFaSlice -e 1 && grep -F 'source_sha256=00b54fc7349179c2efbdab0e4dcb65a69e7b0ab0d0d29b59cc823140d0b40bff' /opt/vcftools/share/doc/vcftools/source.txt >/dev/null && ldd "$(command -v vcftools)" > /tmp/taf-vcftools-ldd.txt && grep -F 'libz.so' /tmp/taf-vcftools-ldd.txt >/dev/null && grep -F 'liblapack.so' /tmp/taf-vcftools-ldd.txt >/dev/null && grep -F 'libc.so' /tmp/taf-vcftools-ldd.txt >/dev/null && if grep -F 'not found' /tmp/taf-vcftools-ldd.txt; then exit 1; fi

tmp=/tmp/taf-vcftools-core-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; cd "$tmp"; printf '%s\n' '##fileformat=VCFv4.2' '##contig=<ID=chr1,length=1000>' '##INFO=<ID=DP,Number=1,Type=Integer,Description="Depth">' '##FORMAT=<ID=GT,Number=1,Type=String,Description="Genotype">' '##FORMAT=<ID=DP,Number=1,Type=Integer,Description="Read Depth">' '#CHROM	POS	ID	REF	ALT	QUAL	FILTER	INFO	FORMAT	s1	s2	s3' 'chr1	10	rs1	A	G	50	PASS	DP=10	GT:DP	0/0:4	0/1:3	1/1:3' 'chr1	20	rs2	C	T	60	PASS	DP=12	GT:DP	0/1:5	0/0:4	0/1:3' 'chr1	30	rs3	G	A	70	PASS	DP=15	GT:DP	1/1:5	0/1:5	0/0:5' 'chr1	40	rs4	T	C	80	PASS	DP=16	GT:DP	0/0:6	0/1:5	1/1:5' 'chr1	50	rs5	A	C	90	PASS	DP=18	GT:DP	0/1:6	0/0:6	0/1:6' > tiny.vcf && vcftools --vcf tiny.vcf --freq --out freq > freq.log 2>&1 && test -s freq.frq && grep -F 'CHROM' freq.frq >/dev/null && vcftools --vcf tiny.vcf --counts --out counts > counts.log 2>&1 && test -s counts.frq.count && grep -F 'CHROM' counts.frq.count >/dev/null && vcftools --vcf tiny.vcf --recode --recode-INFO-all --out recoded > recode.log 2>&1 && test -s recoded.recode.vcf && grep -F 'rs1' recoded.recode.vcf >/dev/null && vcftools --vcf tiny.vcf --site-mean-depth --out depth > depth.log 2>&1 && test -s depth.ldepth.mean && vcftools --vcf tiny.vcf --012 --out matrix > matrix.log 2>&1 && test -s matrix.012 && vcftools --vcf tiny.vcf --pca --out pca > pca.log 2>&1 && test -s pca.pca

tmp=/tmp/taf-vcftools-perl-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; cd "$tmp"; printf '%s\n' '##fileformat=VCFv4.2' '##contig=<ID=chr1,length=1000>' '##INFO=<ID=DP,Number=1,Type=Integer,Description="Depth">' '##FORMAT=<ID=GT,Number=1,Type=String,Description="Genotype">' '#CHROM	POS	ID	REF	ALT	QUAL	FILTER	INFO	FORMAT	s1	s2' 'chr1	30	rs3	G	A	70	PASS	DP=15	GT	1/1	0/0' 'chr1	10	rs1	A	G	50	PASS	DP=10	GT	0/0	0/1' 'chr1	20	rs2	C	T	60	PASS	DP=12	GT	0/1	0/0' > unsorted.vcf && vcf-validator unsorted.vcf > validator.log 2>&1 && vcf-stats unsorted.vcf > stats.txt && grep -F 'samples' stats.txt >/dev/null && fill-an-ac unsorted.vcf > filled.vcf && grep -F 'AN=' filled.vcf >/dev/null && vcf-query -f '%CHROM\t%POS\t%REF\t%ALT\n' unsorted.vcf > query.tsv && grep -F "$(printf 'chr1\t30\tG\tA')" query.tsv >/dev/null && vcf-sort unsorted.vcf > sorted.vcf && grep -F "$(printf 'chr1\t10')" sorted.vcf >/dev/null && gzip -c sorted.vcf > sorted.vcf.gz && gunzip -c sorted.vcf.gz | grep -F 'rs1' >/dev/null

tmp=/tmp/taf-vcftools-index-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; cd "$tmp"; printf '%s
' '##fileformat=VCFv4.2' '##contig=<ID=chr1,length=1000>' '##INFO=<ID=DP,Number=1,Type=Integer,Description="Depth">' '##FORMAT=<ID=GT,Number=1,Type=String,Description="Genotype">' '#CHROM	POS	ID	REF	ALT	QUAL	FILTER	INFO	FORMAT	s1	s2' 'chr1	10	rs1	A	G	50	PASS	DP=10	GT	0/0	0/1' 'chr1	20	rs2	C	T	60	PASS	DP=12	GT	0/1	0/0' > tiny.vcf && bgzip -c tiny.vcf > tiny.vcf.gz && tabix -p vcf tiny.vcf.gz && vcf-isec -n +1 tiny.vcf.gz > isec.vcf && grep -F 'rs1' isec.vcf >/dev/null && vcf-compare tiny.vcf.gz tiny.vcf.gz > compare.txt && grep -F 'Number of REF matches' compare.txt >/dev/null && perl -e 'print ">chr1
", "A"x19, "C", "A"x30, "
"' > ref.fa && samtools faidx ref.fa && samtools faidx ref.fa chr1:1-20 | vcf-consensus tiny.vcf.gz > consensus.fa && grep -F '>chr1:1-20' consensus.fa >/dev/null && gnuplot --version | grep -F 'gnuplot' >/dev/null

upstream.name: VCFtools
upstream.citation: Danecek et al. 2011, The variant call format and VCFtools
